item.description:
• Make music 🎵 — generate original, commercial-safe background music on your Mac from a text prompt (upbeat corporate, lofi study beats, cinematic…). Audio studio → the new “Music” mode. Runs fully on-device.
  • First → last frame video — Kling O1: give a start image and an end image and get a smooth animated transition between them (cloud, uses your fal.ai key).
  • Newer cloud video models — Veo 3.1 and Seedance 1.5 Pro added for higher-quality clips.
  • A real Mac menu bar — every command now lives in the menu bar (File → Generate/Export, Edit → Copy/Delete, View → Fit/History/Palette, Help → Keyboard Shortcuts), searchable from Help and remappable in System Settings.
  • Fixes & polish — the window now tiles to half your screen; the Generate button no longer resizes mid-run; the Turkish/German voice can’t get stuck half-installed; filler-word removal is honest about non-English clips; clearer labels and small readability fixes throughout.
